# Do not report security-sensitive issues in public issues

Please close this issue and follow `SECURITY.md`.

Security-sensitive reports may include:

- bypassing mainnet safety gates;
- unaudited script/contract exploit;
- replay or double-spend issue;
- verifier/receipt forgery;
- private key or signer exposure;
- MCP host exploit;
- bridge/facilitator payment-proof exploit.

Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting if enabled, or contact the maintainer privately as described in `SECURITY.md`.
